//: AgencyOS optional integrations. The core commands (/intake, /research, /proposal, /status) need NO MCP servers — research uses Claude Code's built-in web search. Only /kickoff benefits from email + calendar.
//gmail: Connect Gmail in Claude (Settings → Connectors, or the Claude.ai integrations page) to let /kickoff draft real outreach emails. It is a user-level connector, not a project server, so it does not need an entry here.
//calendar: Connect Google Calendar the same way to let /kickoff place kickoff/discovery holds.
//note: Without these connected, /kickoff still works: it writes the email body + event details into the client file so you can send them manually.
